items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival ~
C House Triomphe Backpack
Super practical Triomphe canvas print backpack. Compared to previous Celine backpacks, this one is much smaller but looks more exquisite and cute.
Don't let the small size fool you; the capacity is very large.
Can be worn casually or mixed with jackets and baseball jackets for a different style.
Style No.: 197662
Color: Beige Brown
Size: 20×10.5×17

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️
CE New Mini16 Shoulder Bag
The 16 series has a new model again. This time, unlike the previous plain leather, it uses durable grainy leather, showing more texture. Despite being small, the capacity is impressive; it fits two phones easily. Can be worn on one shoulder or crossbody, with an adjustable strap. Lightweight!!
Style: Versatile item
Capacity: Among mini bags, the capacity is top-tier, very spacious
Model: 10m443
Color: Tan Brown (with original packaging)
Size: 18×12×3.5cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
CELIN* Upgraded Triumphal Arch Tofu Bag 188423_ Full Leather Black
Imported cowhide material, pure sheepskin lining + vintage steel hardware
The new definition of the Triumphal Arch concept, adding Parisian elements
Vintage style, noble temperament, recognized by the fashion world again
A favorite of many celebrities, classic reinvented, reshaping the classic
Exquisite buckle design, very in line with the fashion forefront ✔️
Size: 18.5-14-6cm (Includes original gift box 🎁)
